configuration.shulkerPanel.srdkPath.desc: Custom path for srdk / srdk.exe. Leave empty to auto-detect from workspace root (srdk.exe on Windows, srdk on Unix).
configuration.shulkerPanel.autoRefresh.d: Automatically refresh the task panel when .lvt files change.
configuration.shulkerPanel.showNonProjec: Show a hint when no ShulkerRDK project is detected.
